Volcanic Heat Build: Cumulative fatigue from 5800 feet in humid paradise air demands fueling discipline.

final_verdict.one_liner: Paradise charity Gran Fondo conquering West Maui's volcanic majesty.

videos.title: Pedal Imua Gran Fondo 2023 (West Maui Loop)
videos.description:
The Pedal Imua Gran Fondo is an annual 60-mile charity event that navigates you around the famed West Maui loop.

Here's footage from my participation in the December 2nd event.


ROUTE
• RidewithGPS: https://shorturl.at/elCZ7

EQUIP
• iPhone 13 Pro
• GoPro Hero 11
• Evoc Bike Bag Pro

BIKE
• S-works / Tarmac SL7
• • • Crank: 48/35t
• • • Gear ratio: 10-33t
• • • Wheels: Roval CLX50
• • • Tires: Goodyear Eagle F1













#pedalimua #westmauiloop #cyclinggranfondo #cyclingevent #cycling #cyclinglife #ostroy #kaskhelmets #customcyclinghelmets #evoc #evocbikebagpro

videos.description:

videos.title: Pedal Imua Gran Fondo Event 2022
videos.description:
This famed, scenic Gran Fondo ride around Maui's west side benefits Dream Imua, a wish granting program for children in crisis within Maui County.

🔗 For more info 👉🏾 pedalimua.com

videos.title: Pedal Imua - A Benefit Ride on Maui Hawaii
videos.description: Get ready for the first annual Pedal Imua, a benefit ride for children with special needs.  This 100k ride will circumvent the West Maui Mountains and raise funds for Dream Imua, a program for children in crisis.

videos.title: Conor O'Brian's 190 Mile Epic Ride Around Maui and Up : Raising $31K for a children's non profit
videos.description:
Conor O’Brian rides 190 miles around all of Maui, finishing at the 10,000’ summit of Haleakala volcano. In the five weeks leading up to the ride and in the week following, Conor raised $31,000 for a local children's non-profit organization, Imua Family Services.

Conor is an adventure cyclist, a gravel bike racer, a community builder, and a graphic artist. He discovered a passion for cycling while working for an outdoor industry company that facilitated adventurous trips for kids. Since 2019, he’s bikepacked a cumulative 10,000+ miles throughout the US before shifting focus to racing and long-distance adventure riding. Since 2022, he’s spent his winters working at Maui Sunriders Bike Shop in Maui, facilitating and guiding bike tours while focusing on his own training. 

LEARN MORE ABOUT CONOR
https://www.designsbyconor.com/
Instagram: @conor.obrian
Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/21749980

LEARN MORE ABOUT IMUA FAMILY SERVICES:
https://imuafamily.org/

PEDAL IMUA - Imua Family Services annual fundraising ride around the West Maui Mountains
https://pedalimua.com/

SPECIAL THANKS
Panaracer: https://www.panaracerusa.com/
The Feed: http://thefeed.cc/conor.obrian
Athletic Brewing Company: https://athleticbrewing.rfrl.co/1gqor
Flow Formulas: https://flowformulas.com/r?id=oagdve
Maui Sunriders Bike Shop: https://mauisunriders.com/
Shoots Productions: https://shootsproductions.com/
Fuzz Box: https://www.fuzzboxproductions.com




#ConorOBrien #Maui #Bicycle #Adventure #Charity #Travel #Explore #Fundraising #Outdoors #Nature #Vacation #GoodCause #HealthyLifestyle #Hawaii #SummerVibes #DoGood #RideForCharity #MakeADifference #GiveBack #InspireOthers #PedalForChange #BikingForCharity #rideforacause

quotes.text: The route is 60 miles with approximately 4,000 ft of climbing there's a few short steep climbs in the northern part of the route but for the most part nothing too serious and you're going around mountain passes, you've got ocean views, you go through jungle terrain.

I just wiped out and crashed just about 5 miles back on a wet tight corner, I didn't get hurt too bad just kind of scraped up my kit and my knee but all things considered this is a really beautiful ride.

key_challenges.name: Final final climb
key_challenges.description: The last major climb around mile 52, described as the final challenge before the finish.

key_challenges.name: Wet tight corners
key_challenges.description: Wet, tight corners that can cause crashes around mile 47, with one rider wiping out on a wet corner.

key_challenges.name: Short steep climbs
key_challenges.description: A few short steep climbs in the northern part of the route, though described as nothing too serious overall.

terrain_notes.text: Some sections where the road is pretty narrow, going around mountain passes with ocean views and jungle terrain.
Wet tight corners that can be slippery and cause crashes, especially later in the route.

additional_quotes.text: I managed to beat my time from last year by 5 minutes flat which is weird considering that last year I had a blowout and I was off the bike for at least 30 minutes dealing with fixing the tire issue

This event is absolutely incredible so I highly recommend it for anyone looking to do an island style cycling Venture but also the event supports an important charitable cause for children and families in crisis
The event starts at the UA Discovery Garden in the town of wuku - it's an incredible looking estate really like where the event is held

rider_intel.search_text: Pedal IMUA is a 60-mile gravel event in Maui starting at UA Discovery Garden in Wailuku with approximately 4,000 feet of climbing. The route features mountain passes with ocean views and jungle terrain, though some sections have narrow roads. Riders face a few short steep climbs in the northern section and a significant final climb around mile 52. Wet, tight corners pose crash risks, particularly later in the route around mile 47. The event supports Maui Family Services' Dream IMUA program for children and families in crisis. One experienced rider completed the course in 4 hours despite dealing with tire issues. The route offers stunning island scenery but requires caution on technical sections with narrow roads and potentially slippery corners.
